Templates › Customer Feedback & Review Form

⭐ Customer Feedback & Review Form

Collect customer feedback and make it easy for happy clients to leave you a Google review — the fastest way to grow your tradie business.

How to use: Leave this with every customer. A Google review from a happy client is worth its weight in gold. All fields are editable — click any text to change it.

Click to upload logo
CUSTOMER FEEDBACK
Date: 2026-01-01
Job: Job description / address

Thank you for choosing [Your Business Name]. We'd love to hear how we did — your feedback helps us improve.

Overall Rating
Quality of work 1   5
Tidiness / clean-up 1   5
Communication 1   5
Punctuality 1   5
Value for money 1   5
Comments
Happy with our work? Leave us a Google review!
Visit: [your Google Business link here — g.page/yourbusiness/review]
It takes 2 minutes and helps other Kiwis find a tradie they can trust. Thank you!
Your Name (optional)
NZ Tradie Tools — tradietools.nz

⭐ Customer Feedback & Review Form

No sign-up required. Free forever.

How to use this template

  • Click any field to edit it
  • Fill in your business details first
  • Click "Download PDF" to save
  • Or click "Print" for a paper copy

Leave this with every customer. A Google review from a happy client is worth its weight in gold.
